# Golden Fixtures

Reference inputs and PyTorch outputs that pin the cosine-floor parity gate
in `.github/workflows/parity.yml`. **Committed in-tree** so the parity
workflow runs whenever `FINDIT_INDEXER_TOKEN` is configured — no
out-of-band PyTorch step is required to flip the gate green.

## Images

`images/` holds 12 lossless `.png` keyframes that span the aspect-ratio
space NaFlex resizes through (square, common landscape/portrait, extreme
wide/tall, plus a small below-budget size). The set is procedurally
generated by `scripts/generate_synthetic_keyframes.py` so the entire
fixture pipeline is reproducible without external corpora.

## Embeddings

For each image `<name>.png`, `embeddings/<name>.npy` holds the 768-dim
PyTorch-reference embedding as a 1-D `float32` array.

For text fixtures, `text_prompts.json` lists 12 multilingual prompts
(English, Chinese, Japanese — see spec §5.1) and `text_embeddings.npy`
is a `[N, 768]` `float32` array of reference embeddings, one per prompt
in order.

## Regeneration

End-to-end, two scripts:

```bash
pip install transformers torch pillow numpy
python scripts/generate_synthetic_keyframes.py --out-dir /tmp/keyframes
python scripts/generate_parity_fixtures.py \
    --images-dir /tmp/keyframes/images \
    --prompts-json /tmp/keyframes/prompts.json \
    --out-dir tests/fixtures/
```

After running, commit `tests/fixtures/{images,embeddings}/`,
`text_prompts.json`, and `text_embeddings.npy`.

## Tolerance

Per-fixture cosine similarity between this crate's output and the
reference must be ≥ 0.99917 (the upstream worst-case figure from the
SigLIP2 NaFlex release validation).
